abilities.description: Dash forward X spaces, gain +X , deal X damage, and deal X knockback. X is equal to the number of empty armor slots you have plus one.Upgraded: Dash forward X spaces, gain +X , deal X damage, and deal X knockback. X is equal to twice the number of empty armor slots you have.

translation.ru_description:
Рывок на X клеток: дайте +X [img:shield], нанесите X урона и X Отбрасывания.
X = число пустых слотов брони плюс один.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Рывок на X клеток: дайте +X [img:shield], нанесите X урона и X Отбрасывания.
X = двойное число пустых слотов брони.
translation.en_description:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to the number of empty armor slots you have plus one.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to twice the number of empty armor slots you have.

X = число пустых слотов брони плюс один.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Рывок на X клеток: дайте +X [img:shield], нанесите X урона и X Отбрасывания.
X = двойное число пустых слотов брони.
translation.en_description:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to the number of empty armor slots you have plus one.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Dash forward X spaces, gain +X [img:shield], deal X damage, and deal X knockback.
X is equal to twice the number of empty armor slots you have.
